commands_run: uv run ruff check src tests

tests.detail: 202 python tests, 7 web tests, staged gates, source pin, web build, lint all green at this commit
Lane A ladder happy path plus every threshold/human-only/lane-immutability failure case; golden 1.0.0 digest pin; tier record binding via --bundle-tier-record

tests.command: uv run pytest tests/test_reference_bundle.py tests/test_reference_normalize.py tests/test_appearance_envelope.py tests/test_reference_fitting.py tests/test_segmentation_backends.py
tests.detail: all four Phase-1 modules against the frozen ADR-0002 schemas with synthetic fixtures only

visual_checks.description: reference_fitting synthetic evidence panel (observed vs fitted render vs difference) generated during P1-FIT verification; near-black diffs for the coherent set, saturated diff for the incoherent source

observations.statement: A schema-1.0.0 physical promotion event serializes byte-identically under the new event model and its content digest is pinned as a literal; historical physical ledgers replay unchanged.

The reference lane's state set contains no physical-validation state; agent actors are refused at exact-variant-verified, adversarial-review-passed, and production-reference-derived, which also require named reviewers.

A reference-lane profile omitting the lane field is rejected at publication when its provenance declares public-reference-synthesis, and reference-lane publication fails closed until the bundle-review publication adapter lands.

SAM 3.1 is an official Meta release (facebookresearch/sam3 branch sam3.1, commit 20dba30a, 2026-03-27) with a published checkpoint sha256; the backend refuses inference until the gated checkpoint is present and hash-verified, and no CUDA dependency entered the base environment.

Three independent read-only reviews ran over the full diff: code review MERGEABLE-WITH-FIXES (H1/M1-M4 addressed in commits 1d74007 and 30b0da1), workflow review SOUND-WITH-FIXES (tier binding addressed), security review ACCEPTABLE-WITH-FIXES (both conditions addressed).
observations.source: review transcripts in session; fixes in this branch

observations.statement: No marketplace imagery, private media, or absolute private paths entered the repository; the private-media gate scan is clean and now blocks the full bundle directory set by name.

inferences.statement: Appearance-envelope proposals and reference-fitting outputs will be substantially noisier on real compressed marketplace imagery than on the synthetic fixtures; the model-limit and outlier paths exist for that case but are only synthetically exercised.
Tier thresholds, scoring weights, and fitting acceptance floors are initial proposals and should be recalibrated after the first real bundle.

known_failures: research-renderer Playwright test can time out under parallel software-GPU load; passes in isolation and with CI retry
reference-lane publication is intentionally blocked (fail-closed) until the bundle-review publication adapter replaces the capture-session gate

source_quality_tier on a promotion event is self-declared at the library layer; binding to the fail-closed BundleTierRecord happens in optcg-promote (--bundle-tier-record) and is documented in the threat model
manifest_digest of a reference bundle changes on every save because updated_at participates in the digest
unresolved_questions: Design of the bundle-review publication adapter (bundle manifest + tier record standing in for the session manifest) before any reference profile can publish
Consolidation of the forbidden-phrase constants duplicated across review.py, check-evidence-packet.py, and reference_fitting.py
Whether a deprecation alias for the removed sam3 registry key is wanted

recommended_state_transition.justification: Tooling only: Lane A now exists in code, but no reference bundle has been built, so no profile advances beyond hypothesis.
